name: Play Dough
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, stir the food coloring into water.
2. Add all remaining ingredients to the saucepan.
3. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly with a wooden spoon until the mixture thickens and pulls away from the sides of the pan.
4. Form the mixture into a ball.
5. Allow the play dough to cool completely.
6. Pack the play dough in a zip-lock bag or an air-tight container.
NB: The play dough can also be used as a treat for birthday parties; simply pack it into individual decorative containers.
